changelog:
📋 Gated version history badges so they only show for proposals; Approve/Decline buttons only show on pending proposals.
📝 Note Editor now clean and borderless, maximizing typing space. Collapsed tags/reference fields into an expandable details panel.
🔄 Fixed sync race condition that caused local updates to temporarily revert after a sync.
📥 Added ability to import and export notes (single or batch) from Markdown with YAML frontmatter, plain text, or ZIP archives.
